title: Single Pointed Wooden Bamboo Knitting Needles - 34.5cm x 10mm, Pack of 2 - Lightweight & Durable, Perfect for Knitting Enthusiasts
features: HIGH-QUALITY WOODEN KNITTING NEEDLES: Experience the smooth, natural feel of our single pointed wooden bamboo knitting needles, designed for the ultimate knitting experience and perfect for knitting enthusiasts.

OPTIMAL DIMENSIONS: Each set contains 2 knitting needles measuring 34.5cm x 10mm, the perfect size for a comfortable grip and precision knitting projects, allowing you to create beautiful and intricate works of art.

ECO-FRIENDLY BAMBOO MATERIAL: Made from lightweight and durable bamboo, our knitting needles not only ensure the longevity of your knitting supplies but also contribute to environmentally conscious choices.

IDEAL FOR ALL SKILL LEVELS: Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned pro, our single pointed wooden bamboo knitting needles will enhance your knitting projects by providing excellent glide, reducing snagging, and improving dexterity.

BOOST YOUR KNITTING GAME: Choose our single pointed wooden bamboo knitting needles - 34.5cm x 10mm pack of 2, and elevate your knitting experience with lightweight, durable, and easy-to-use tools that lead to stunning results and increased enjoyment.
description: Experience a smoother, more comfortable knitting experience with our single pointed wooden bamboo knitting needles. Measuring 34.5cm in length and 10mm in diameter, these needles are ideally sized for a variety of knitting projects. This pack of two needles is crafted from high-quality bamboo, combining durability with a lightweight feel for easy handling and reduced hand fatigue. The smooth surface ensures your yarn will glide effortlessly, making knitting more enjoyable and efficient. Perfect for knitting enthusiasts of all skill levels, our bamboo knitting needles provide the comfort and quality you need for your next creation.
